# domainVersion

**Instance Property**

The domain’s version when the system discovered the item at the source location.

## Declaration

```swift
var domainVersion: NSFileProviderDomainVersion? { get }
```

## Accessing the Operation’s Data

- **sourceItem**: A description of the item stored at the source.
- **targetSide**: The target location for the new item.

items.description: A description of the item stored at the source.
items.name: sourceItem

items.description: The target location for the new item.
items.name: targetSide
